title: The Clock Tower Becomes the Key
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on the clock tower becomes the key, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Clock Tower Becomes the Key. Vivi and the others hunt for the hidden cannon before the final explosion can destroy both armies. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Damn it, he's...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fly away...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Gahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Government's

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I've trained harder than anyone else and I've survived countless of life-or-death situations

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So what is it that I'm still lacking...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sense!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Him?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I hear there are people in this world who can even cut through iron!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Is that true!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yes, it's true.

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Look carefully at this sheet of paper, Zero...

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Uhh, you failed.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Listen well, Zero. There are swordsmen in this world who can't cut anything.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Step

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But those same people can cut through iron.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Step

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: All the while using the same sword...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The "strong- EST sword" is a blade that can protect what it wishes to protect and cut what it wishes to cut.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: In my opinion, a blade that cuts whatever it touches cannot be considered a "word"...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Under- stand?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Alright, I'm gonna become a swordsman that can cut through everything!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Zoro, did you even listen to what I said?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hurry up and try to cut me if you can.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You won't get anywhere if all you do is take my attacks.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: it's a shame you won't be able to see me beautifully cut through iron...

summary: This part develops the clock tower becomes the key and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
